roa.docketEntryComment: DEFENDANT'S MOTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1538,5 FILED
DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: STATUS OF DEJ/DAWT/X: THE PEOPLE MAKE AN ORAL 1001,7PC MOTION/TEXT: COURT GRTS MOTION TO DISM PURS PC 1001,7 AS TO COUNT 6/1001,7:   6/CTORD: PETITIONER'S RECORD OF THIS ARREST IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BE SEALED, INCLUDING ALL RECORDS OF THE ARRESTING AGENCY AND RELATED COURT FILED AND RECORDS, PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTIONS 1001,9/

/X THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 11-16-20/CAL PRELIMINARY HERING/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #6, 11377HS, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR 1 YEAR, DEFENDANT NOT TO OBTAIN NO NEW ARRESTS RESULTING IN CHARGES SUPPORTED BY PROBABLE CAUSE AND TO STAY AWAY FROMBELVEDERE & HAIGHT ST IN SAN FRANCISCO (150 YARDS), IF  DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THESE TERMS FOR ONE YEAR, PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND PROPOSED SENTENCE IS FOR CASE TO BE DISMISSED, DEFENDANT TO FORFEIT $700/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/X:DAW IF IN COMPLIANCE/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 11-26-19/987,2/X: THE DEFENDANT REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE,/SA2: 1697 HAIGHT STREET, SF//SAORD4: 150 YARDS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NP/DAWT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 06-30-20AND PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 07-24-20/DOPC/
/CAL: PHC AND STATUS OF DISCOVERY/DAWT/CONT/X: 04-01-20, D9/DOPC/
/PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF DISOVERY/
